title: Guacamole
ingredients: 1 small tomato, seeded and diced finely
1 tsp. good quality salt (Maldon is my preference)
Juice from one lime or more to taste
¼ cup chopped red onions or green onions, optional
Pico de gallo or salsa, optional
instructions: Place peeled and halved avocados in bowl. Smash with pastry blender or fork. Stir in remaining ingredients. Taste and adjust seasonings and heat as desired.
notes: Have fun with this recipe! Make it your own. Good quality salt (or can use good quality garlic salt) is a must!
